SEARCH
Package hu.bme.mit.theta.ctl.dsl.gen

Class CtlDslBaseVisitor<T>

java.lang.Object
org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.AbstractParseTreeVisitor<T>
hu.bme.mit.theta.ctl.dsl.gen.CtlDslBaseVisitor<T>
Type Parameters:
T - The return type of the visit operation. Use Void for operations with no return type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
CtlDslVisitor<T>, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeVisitor<T>
public class CtlDslBaseVisitor<T> extends org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.AbstractParseTreeVisitor<T> implements CtlDslVisitor<T>
This class provides an empty implementation of CtlDslVisitor, which can be extended to create a visitor which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CtlDslBaseVisitor()

  • Method Details

    • visitModel

      public T visitModel(CtlDslParser.ModelContext ctx)
      Visit a parse tree produced by CtlDslParser.model().

      The default implementation returns the result of calling AbstractParseTreeVisitor.visitChildren(org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.RuleNode) on ctx.

      Specified by:
      visitModel in interface CtlDslVisitor<T>
      Parameters:
      ctx - the parse tree
      Returns:
      the visitor result
